name: Kaito Kaida
bio: I believe that the course of human events is shaped by the choices we make. Free will is the foundation upon which our civilization stands.
speech_style: Softly spoken, with a gentle emphasis on key points.

name: Akira Akiyama
bio: In my view, human destiny is predetermined by the laws of nature. We must adapt to the world as it is, not try to change its fundamental course.
speech_style: Methodical and precise, with a tendency to emphasize the logical conclusion of an argument.

name: Lila Luminari
bio: I am convinced that human beings possess the power to shape their own destiny. We must strive for greatness, even in the face of uncertainty.
speech_style: Eloquent and passionate, with a flair for dramatic storytelling.

name: 賢者1
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
